content: Phase 1: Write test_core.py with full POC pipeline
Phase 1: Run test_core.py end-to-end - PASSED with realistic results
Phase 1: User Story validation - PASSED all 7 criteria
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent (2026 fintech, dark theme, multi-pane charts)
Phase 2: Install design libs (lightweight-charts, recharts already installed)
Phase 2: Build FastAPI backend - data models, strategies module, backtest engine, regime detector, indicators, warehouse v2, API routes
Phase 2: Implement 6 built-in strategies as plugins (VWAP Pullback, ORB, Confluence Scalper, SMC Sweep+FVG, Fib Pullback, VWAP Mean Reversion)
Phase 2: Build React frontend - Dashboard, Backtest Lab (TradingView Lightweight Charts), Strategy Picker, Data Warehouse Manager, Pre-trade Checklist, Signal Journal
Phase 3: Implement Auto-Optimizer (Optuna + Grid + CMA-ES) with walk-forward + heatmaps + robustness
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + paper trading + audit trail
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine (Kaplan-Meier) + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
Phase 6: Swing Extension - daily/weekly TF + overnight risk
Phase 7: Local Deployment Package - Docker Compose + scripts + LOCAL_SETUP_GUIDE.md
